text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: ...Okay! Let's take a break!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sounds good. Phew...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Ugh, my shoulders are so stiff. This sure is
different from a normal shoot.
choice_data_list: It's for an academy publication, after all.
It's for an academy publication, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City, through her agency, was asked to be
photographed for a brochure Tracen is putting
out. I'm here representing both parties.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sure, but it's more like a costume issue. I mean, I know how you're supposed to move in a kimono...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But actually having a kimono on you is different,
you know? It's kind of tricky.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I wonder... These all look super great, but...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sorry... Is it not what you had imagined?

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
No, you've been perfect! I was just thinking... we
might want to try changing up the vibe a bit.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
We've captured the gracefulness of the kimono,
but you appear almost... too sophisticated.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So... do you want me to relax a little for the next
few?

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
No, let me think about it for a minute. I want to
come up with something more innovative that'll
highlight your charm... Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: I know! We should have her trainer help out!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you! You're well aware of City's charm, so
you're bound to come up with an idea we can't.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But Trainer's just a regular trainer.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
That's precisely the point! What do you say?
Please, would you lend us a hand?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well... think you're up to it?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
They're just looking for something new, whatever
comes to mind first would be fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I'm caught off guard by the sudden
request, I try to think of a concept that would
accentuate Gold City's charm.
choice_data_list: Maybe a yokai? Like Tamamo-no-Mae vibes.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: A what?! Celestial maiden...

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Oh, just wow! That's exactly what I'm talking
about, Trainer! That's perfect for her
transcendental charm!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
I'll arrange the location immediately! If a celestial
maiden is the idea...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flash! Flash! Flash!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Yes! That's it! Mystique melting in light... so
beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: She looks like a real celestial maiden... so pretty...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Thanks... But, for real, celestial maiden? You
always have to say the most embarrassing things.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What in the world do you see me as?
choice_data_list:
An opinion from one of your fans gave me the
idea.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time ago, I overheard a fan of Gold City
saying she looked like a celestial maiden in one
of her photos.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...That's it? That's why you picked it?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Screw you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splaaash!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: That's right, get soaked! Don't run away!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's a rare expression coming from Gold
City... A prime chance for some
behind-the-scenes shots.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What? A yokai?

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
I never would have thought of that! Bewitching
and... yeah, I'm starting to get the image! Let's try
it!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Seriously?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flash! Flash! Flash!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Amazing... I feel like I'm being sucked into her
eyes!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: Gulp... City, I didn't know you could do a face like this...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hey, are you trying to start a fight with me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What are you trying to say, calling me a yokai?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I know I fit the bad girl type more than
"innocent angel"...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Okay, then what did you mean?
choice_data_list:
It's because you're always fighting against
something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to find a Japanese concept that reflects
how she fights to make progress even when it
hurts. For whatever reason, yokai is what first
came to mind.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: That's absurd, and the explanation was even worse. Your concept turned out looking more alluring than cool.
choice_data_list: The bewitching look suited you too!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But that's not what you were going for, was it?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Wait here. I'm going to ask the photographer to
let us do some improvised shots.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You wanted to see the fighter in me, right? Well...
try not to fall in love.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This time Gold City captivates the entire crew
with her belligerent eyes.
